footer.descripcion: A platform for head-to-head duels, ELO ranking and visual tournaments between the most iconic anime characters. You decide who rules.
footer.codigoAbiertoTitulo: View the project source on GitHub

newsletter.intro: Get new tournaments, featured rankings and daily trials straight to your inbox.
newsletter.okDefault: We've sent you a confirmation email.
newsletter.doubleOptIn: We'll send you a confirmation email. You can unsubscribe any time from any newsletter footer.
newsletter.errorEnvio: Couldn't send. Try again in a few seconds.

hero.subtitulo: 1v1 duels, live ELO ranking and new tournaments every week. Your vote moves the meta.
hero.features: Vote duels · Compete in tournaments · Climb the ELO ranking

torneos.subtitulo: Head-to-head brackets between catalog characters. Open any tournament to see the full roster and match status.
torneos.errorFallback: Try again in a few seconds.
torneos.vacioSub: The next tournament is auto-generated every few days. Meanwhile, vote the open duels of casual mode and push your favorite characters up the ELO.
torneos.vacioContador: Next bracket within the next few days

votar.subtituloPagina: Pick the winner of each matchup.

personajes.subtituloPagina: Full catalog with stats by anime.
